title: Crawl on Demand
description: Allows the player to assign a hot key to allow going prone (crawling) on demand
body: Have you ever wanted to crawl through a one-block-high space in Minecraft, but didn't have a trapdoor handy? Or sneak past your enemies without being seen? If you answered yes to any of these questions, then you need the Crawl on Demand Mod! This mod lets you go prone (crawl) on the ground by pressing a hotkey. You can crawl through any space that is at least one block high. This mod adds a whole new dimension to your Minecraft experience, allowing you to explore new places, hide from danger, and roleplay as a spy or a soldier. Download it today and unleash your inner crawler! Now that the fun stuff is out of the way, the Crawl on Demand (Go Prone) mod is compatible with most other mods, and it works in both single player and multiplayer including on servers. The default key to toggle crawl is LEFT-ALT, but this can be changed to whatever you like in Key Binds.
